properties.name: action
properties.title: ACTION
properties.description: Choose 'reserve' to hold values for future use, or 'release' to free previously reserved values

properties.name: numericPoolName
properties.title: POOL NAME
properties.description: Name of the numeric pool to act on

properties.name: numericPoolScope
properties.title: POOL SCOPE
properties.description: Scope of the pool (auto-filled when pool name is selected)

properties.name: values
properties.title: VALUES
properties.description: List of numeric values to reserve or release — enter as a JSON array, e.g. [4, 5]

properties.name: reference
properties.title: REFERENCE
properties.description: Label identifying this reservation (used for reserve only)

properties.name: owner
properties.title: OWNER
properties.description: Owner of this reservation (used for reserve only)
